scripts.build: cross-env TS_NODE_PROJECT=tsconfig.node.json node -r ts-node/register ./node_modules/webpack-cli/bin/cli.js --config webpack.config.ts --mode production
scripts.start: cross-env TS_NODE_PROJECT=tsconfig.node.json node -r ts-node/register ./node_modules/webpack-cli/bin/cli.js serve --config webpack.config.ts --mode development
